title: Curitiba, PR — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Curitiba is a city in PR with a population of 1,963,726. Brazil’s greenest city and a global model for urban planning, famous for its BRT system, parks, and high environmental standards.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
